content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.30%, Bank Nifty -1.55%, Realty -2.94%, Auto -2.09% with VIX spiking +10.5% to 18.60 — clear risk-off tape. Defensives (FMCG, Pharma, IT) bid up sharply as rotation play. Book is 50% deployed with 12 holdings; priority is risk management on existing book, NOT chasing extended defensives that gapped up today.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF defensive in risk-off tape. -1.1% P&L within SL. CMP 123.79 vs SL 121 = 2.3% buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 825 to 828 (still 1.3% below CMP 840) — preserves 1% gain lock while keeping room. Q4 PAT +14% YoY beat, FMCG defensive rotation strong, stock at 52w high. Extending target to 870 to capture momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.3% gain. Current SL 1357.20 only 1.4% below CMP 1376.40 — too tight, risks self-stopout per Rule (d). Loosening SL slightly to 1340 (2.6% below CMP) — wait, this would LOOSEN SL which is rejected. Keeping SL at 1357.20 but extending target to 1450 given Q4 PAT beat + Cigniti merger catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37% YoY beat, UVG 15.3% — fundamentals intact. -3.2% loss, CMP 1446.90 vs SL 1465 — already through SL. Per Rule 17, do not panic-exit; let SL fire if hit. CMP 1446.90 < SL 1465 means SL likely already triggered — engine should handle. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1610.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% gain. Q4 net profit Rs 164cr swing from loss, biotech +27%, EBITDA margin 20.3% vs 10.7%. Trail SL from 1600 to 1610 (1.2% below CMP 1626.50, just above 1% trail-gap floor). Pharma at 52w high; momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% gain. Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 PAT +46.7%, Odisha refrigerants capex upsized. SL 2760 sits 2.1% below CMP 2820 — healthy buffer, no trail yet (gain too small). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% P&L. CMP 9072 vs SL 9020 — 0.6% buffer. Q4 revenue record high, brokerage targets Rs 9,800-10,500. Hold; SL will protect."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.2% loss, CMP 351.80 vs SL 354 — SL likely about to trigger. Per Rule 17, do not preemptively close on intraday wobble; let SL fire. Fundamentals (Q4 PAT +31%, lending AUM crossing Rs 2L cr) intact — exit will be SL-driven, not thesis-driven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.9% but Q4 PAT +103% YoY, buyback at Rs 12,000 (~14% premium to CMP) provides floor. CMP 10565 vs SL 10440 = 1.2% buffer. Strong relative strength (-0.38% on -2.09% Auto day). Hold through buyback catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3% loss, CMP 476 vs SL 472 = 0.8% buffer. FMCG defensive holding. SL fires if it fires; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.5% gain. Current SL 1228 is 2.3% below CMP 1256.90. Trailing to 1240 (1.3% below CMP, above 1% floor) locks in +1.1% breakeven-plus. ATH Rs 1200 broken, momentum strong. Target extended to 1320 (consistent with R:R intact, 1240→1320 = +6.5% vs new entry-equivalent risk)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.5% loss, CMP 1226.70 vs SL 1198 = 2.4% buffer. Stock had a sharp morning spike to 1253 then faded — typical gap-and-fade behavior on a +6.5% mover, well within SL absorption. Q4 PAT +21.5% beat fundamentally supportive. Hold to SL."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold hedge; CMP within SL band."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in small gain on FMCG defensive at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1357.20 (1.4% below CMP). Cannot loosen per engine rules. Wait for further move up before trailing higher."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1446.90 below SL 1465 — SL will trigger. Do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1610.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to lock gain; pharma sector at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small gain, SL 2.1% below — adequate buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Let SL fire if hit; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at Rs 12,000 supports; SL 1.2% below CMP adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL in place; let it fire if hit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in breakeven-plus on ATH breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gap-and-fade within SL absorption; Q4 fundamentals support."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "On a -1.3% Nifty / VIX +10.5% day with 12 holdings already on the book (50% deployed), the disciplined call is NOT to chase today's defensive gappers. Per-name reject rationale for BULLISH watchlist candidates: SUNPHARMA/TORNTPHARM — Pharma already represented via WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS (cluster discipline, Rule 10). BIOCON — reported PAT -57% YoY headline risk + governance succession overhang (Rule 13 caution). BAJAJ-AUTO add — already held, no top-up justified at -1.9% with buyback floor known. POLYCAB add — already held. PERSISTENT — extended IT, COFORGE already held at +9% covering IT cluster. CGPOWER — Capital Goods sector down sharply, single-name strength on risk-off day is fade candidate not entry. MCX — extended +4% on the day, chase risk. HCLTECH/INFY — IT cluster already covered via COFORGE. NIFTYBEES — broad market BEARISH on a -1.3% day, not accumulation. NTPC — Q4 results May 15 = binary event within 3 sessions, Rule 11 NO_ACTION on new entry. APOLLOHOSP — pharma cluster cap. Cash buffer ₹505K (50%) is intentional given VIX spike and Tuesday CPI binary risk ahead — this is rule-justified caution, not anchoring (Rule 18 contrast).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with strong defensive tilt (FMCG: MARICO/DABUR/TATACONSUM; Pharma: WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS; IT: COFORGE; Chemicals: SRF/PIDILITIND; Gold hedge: GOLDBEES). Today's risk-off tape validates the positioning — defensives are up while cyclicals bleed. Net daily P&L still positive +₹5,218 even as Nifty -1.3%. Key risks: PIDILITIND and ABCAPITAL likely to SL-trigger; DABUR/TATACONSUM near SLs. Accepting those SL exits is the plan, not a failure — they were sized to absorb 2-3% noise and that's playing out. Cash reserved (~₹505K) for post-CPI Tuesday re-deployment when VIX normalizes and direction clarifies. HFCL open BUY order at 133.50 is stale (placed 7555m ago) — should be cancelled but no CANCEL action in schema for separate orders; will revisit. Trailing SLs on COFORGE (already tight), MARICO, WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS lock in gains across the winners."
}
